LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-18-2024 HEARINGS RE: 1.) DEFENDANTS PAUL ROGERS AND ONPOINT LOGISTICS LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION; AND 2.) DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC'S JOINDER TO MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULINGS. THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED AND THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE ARBITRATION. THE JOINDER IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: S.
